channel.title: GitHub Kotlin Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Kotlin in GitHub

item.title: ethereum-lists/chains
item.description: provides metadata for chains

item.title: amir1376/ab-download-manager
item.description: A Download Manager that speeds up your downloads

item.title: gedoor/legado
item.description: Legado 3.0 Book Reader with powerful controls & full functions❤️阅读3.0, 阅读是一款可以自定义来源阅读网络内容的工具，为广大网络文学爱好者提供一种方便、快捷舒适的试读体验。

item.title: z-huang/InnerTune
item.description: A Material 3 YouTube Music client for Android

item.title: ReVanced/revanced-patches
item.description: 🧩 Patches for ReVanced

item.title: ankidroid/Anki-Android
item.description: AnkiDroid: Anki flashcards on Android. Your secret trick to achieve superhuman information retention.

item.title: MatsuriDayo/NekoBoxForAndroid
item.description: NekoBox for Android / sing-box / universal proxy toolchain for Android

item.title: 2dust/v2rayNG
item.description: A V2Ray client for Android, support Xray core and v2fly core

item.title: RikkaApps/Shizuku
item.description: Using system APIs directly with adb/root privileges from normal apps through a Java process started with app_process.

item.title: yairm210/Unciv
item.description: Open-source Android/Desktop remake of Civ V

item.title: fcitx5-android/fcitx5-android
item.description: Fcitx5 input method framework and engines ported to Android

item.title: lizongying/my-tv-0
item.description: 我的電視·〇 電視視頻播放軟件，可以自定義視頻源

item.title: d4rken-org/sdmaid-se
item.description: SD Maid 2/SE is Android's most thorough cleaning tool.

item.title: android/architecture-samples
item.description: A collection of samples to discuss and showcase different architectural tools and patterns for Android apps.

item.title: CCBlueX/LiquidBounce
item.description: A free mixin-based injection hacked client for Minecraft using the Fabric API

item.title: square/okhttp
item.description: Square’s meticulous HTTP client for the JVM, Android, and GraalVM.

item.title: DD3Boh/OuterTune
item.description: A Material 3 Music Player with YouTube Music support for Android. Forked from InnerTune

item.title: jellyfin/jellyfin-androidtv
item.description: Android TV Client for Jellyfin

item.title: tanujnotes/Olauncher
item.description: Minimal AF Launcher for Android. Reduce your screen time. Daily wallpapers.

item.title: JetBrains/compose-multiplatform
item.description: Compose Multiplatform, a modern UI framework for Kotlin that makes building performant and beautiful user interfaces easy and enjoyable.

item.title: deniscerri/ytdlnis
item.description: Android Video/Audio Downloader app using yt-dlp

item.title: home-assistant/android
item.description: 📱 Home Assistant Companion for Android
